mapper.insert: insert into pf_member(name, member_no, gender, phone, id_card, referral_channel, address, membership_level, membership_date, training_camp_id, create_time, update_time) values(#{name}, #{memberNo}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{idCard}, #{referralChannel}, #{address}, #{membershipLevel}, #{membershipDate}, #{trainingCampId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update:
update pf_member
name = #{name},
member_no = #{memberNo},
gender = #{gender},
phone = #{phone},
id_card = #{idCard},
referral_channel = #{referralChannel},
address = #{address},
membership_level = #{membershipLevel},
membership_date = #{membershipDate},
training_camp_id = #{trainingCampId},
service_alert_count = #{serviceAlertCount},
risk_points = #{riskPoints},
update_time = #{updateTime}
where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from pf_member where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select count(*) from pf_member where training_camp_id = #{campId}
SELECT ptc.name AS campName, COUNT(pm.id) AS num FROM pf_training_camp ptc LEFT JOIN pf_member pm ON ptc.id = pm.training_camp_id GROUP BY ptc.id, ptc.name ORDER BY ptc.id
select membership_level as name, count(*) value from pf_member group by membership_level
